info.name: Preprocess Standalone for LGBM
info.description: Standalone for Preprocess CSV raw data into cleaned CSV for LGBM training

parameters.name: Bucket
parameters.help: Bucket where your dataset is hosted

parameters.name: Window Size
parameters.help: Window size in seconds for sample generation

parameters.name: Sequence Length
parameters.help: Number of rows to keep per sample before mean aggregation

parameters.name: Skip Times
parameters.help: Number of trailing rows to skip per trip for leakage prevention
